name: Cherry Cheesecake Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 17 oz Dark sweet cherries (pitted and well drained), or
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
3. Add the remaining ingredients; mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into an ice cream freezer container.
5. Freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
6. Makes 1-1/2 quarts.
